node.text: Gina has a trophy from a dance contest as a reminder of the hard work, dedication, and joy dance brings.

node.text: Gina encouraged Jon to keep up the good work and not forget his passion for dance.

node.text: Gina loves spending time in the dance studio and values dance as a way to express oneself and find happiness.
